GBQualifier.GBQualifier_value: Porcine reproductive and respiratory syndrome virus
non-experimental evidence, no additional details recorded
Contains papain-like cysteine proteinase domains 1a (PCP1a) and 1b (PCP1b). Cleavage at the C-terminus is mediated by PCP1b.
non-experimental evidence, no additional details recorded
contains cysteine proteinase 2 domain (CP2) that mediates cleavage at the C-terminus. The N-terminus is the product of proteinase PCP1b.

The E protein appears to be an ion-channel protein that may function in the uncoating process during virus entry and penetratio; E protein has been added by NCBI Staff with the kind help of Dr. David Karlin (Department of Zoology, University of Oxford, UK)

possibly it is the eighth structural protein of the arterivirus particle; ORF5a protein has been added by NCBI Staff with the kind help of Dr. David Karlin (Department of Zoology, University of Oxford, UK) and Dr. Andrew Firth (Department of Pathology, University of Cambridge, UK)
